headline: What Elevance Health (ELV)'s Raised EPS Outlook and Insider Stock Sale Means For Shareholders
summary: Earlier this week, Elevance Health reported stronger-than-expected FY2026 Q1 results and raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance, while its Chief Accounting Officer Ronald W. Penczek exercised and sold 1,531 fully vested stock options at US$403.13 per share, leaving him with 4,109 directly held shares. The upbeat earnings report, higher guidance, and supportive analyst commentary on margins and valuation have reinforced investor attention on Elevance Health’s operational execution and...
